content: Anthropic structured outputs are now GA (no beta header needed as of 2025). Use client.messages.parse() with output_config: { format: zodOutputFormat(schema) } or jsonSchemaOutputFormat(). Zod integration is clean: import { z } from 'zod'; import { zodOutputFormat } from '@anthropic-ai/sdk/helpers/zod'. The existing @anthropic-ai/sdk 0.52.0 in the project may need an upgrade to access .messages.parse() and zodOutputFormat — check if these methods exist. If not, the existing pattern of prompting for JSON and calling JSON.parse() on the response text still works reliably for calendar generation (the codebase already does this for all tools in registry.ts). Model: claude-sonnet-4-5 or claude-sonnet-4-6 both support structured outputs.
